subcodes.first_line: O Javád! The letter which his honor Áqá Muḥammad—upon him be Bahá—wrote unto thee hath been laid before the Most Holy Court [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا جواد مکتوبیکه جناب آقا محمد علیه بهائی بشما نوشته عبد حاضر در ساحت اقدس
subcodes.subjects: @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual transformation, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
